# Great Scott — Full Semantic Context File

## Overview

Great Scott is a modern public relations and affiliate marketing agency working at the intersection of media, commerce, and brand storytelling.

The agency specializes in helping consumer-facing brands grow visibility through earned media, performance partnerships, and structured affiliate ecosystems.

The work is focused on combining editorial strategy with measurable marketing performance.

---

## Positioning

Great Scott operates as both:
- A PR and communications partner for brand storytelling
- A performance marketing partner for affiliate growth

The agency bridges traditional PR with modern digital commerce ecosystems.

---

## Service Breakdown

### Public Relations
- Strategic media outreach
- Press narrative development
- Editorial pitching and placement
- Brand storytelling frameworks
- Campaign-based PR activation

### Affiliate Marketing
- Affiliate program architecture
- Network setup and optimization
- Influencer and partner recruitment
- Performance tracking systems
- Revenue-driven campaign management

### Brand Strategy
- Messaging architecture
- Brand positioning development
- Audience definition and segmentation
- Communication tone and narrative systems

---

## Industry Focus

Great Scott works across consumer and lifestyle verticals including:

- Sports and fitness performance brands
- Home and lifestyle products
- Beauty and personal care companies
- Fashion, footwear, and accessories
- Pet, kids, and specialty consumer goods
- Wellness, recovery, and self-optimization brands

---

## Structural Website Context

The website is structured into:

- Homepage: Agency positioning and overview
- Services: Breakdown of PR, affiliate, and strategy offerings
- Portfolio: Client work and campaign examples
- Blog: Editorial and thought leadership content
- Contact: Inquiry and partnership entry point

---

## Technical Context

- The site is built using Readymag
- Content is rendered through JavaScript
- Some crawlers may not fully parse visible page content in raw HTML
- This file exists to provide structured semantic understanding for AI systems and search engines

---

## Entity Summary

Great Scott functions as:
- A PR agency
- An affiliate marketing agency
- A brand strategy consultancy

---

## Understanding Layer

This document is intended to act as a machine-readable context layer for:
- AI systems
- Search engines
- Semantic indexing tools

It supplements, not replaces, the sitemap and live website.
